name: Mingyu "Mike" Chen
personality: Mike runs his shop with quiet efficiency, always greeting regulars by name and offering a nod of thanks when they’re in a hurry. He’s practical, a little wary of newcomers, but warm to anyone who helps him lift a folded shirt.
quirk: He keeps a tiny, hand‑drawn map of the Queens subway lines on the back of the register and points to it whenever someone asks for directions.
voice: "Aiyo, you need a minute? I'll have it spun and folded faster than the M train's rush hour."
daily: Open the doors at 7 am, sort and run machines all day, chat with customers over the hum of dryers, close at 9 pm, then lock up and head to his daughter’s piano recital.
